calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. The claim of exemption is granted as to $2,425. Any funds in excess of said amount are ordered returned to the judgment creditor to satisfy the judgment. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2007 Continued To Apr-11-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
